title: Creeper explosions drop all items
body:
![The creeper drops all the blocks it explodes](https://i.ibb.co/PwnCM2w/ezgif-com-video-to-gif-1.gif)

This is a very simple (one mixin copying a built in method and changing one line) mod, creepers will drop all blocks they explode.

This is done by changing a creepers explosion type to be TNT instead of Creeper, this doesn't appear to noticeable in game, as a creeper death still says it was the creeper that caused it.
